chain_of_thought: As a robot agent: identify kettle chips, pick them, and deliver them to the user.
As a robot agent: locate the grapefruit soda, pick it up, and place it on the counter.
As a robot agent: select jalapeno chips and an apple, then bring both items to the user.
As a robot agent: choose an energy bar since the request excludes fruit, then deliver it.
As a robot agent: complete tasks in order—move rice chips to the bowl, then move tea to the table.
As a robot agent: locate the redbull, pick it up, and dispose of it in the trash.
As a robot agent: select water and bring it to the user.
